title: dovyalis zenkeri
intro: Dovyalis zenkeri, also known as the Cussonia or Wild Pear, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dovyalis zenkeri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
